prompt: I want to see what happens to Net Income in both years if I increase the unit price from $100 to $150. Walk me through the full write-recalculate-read cycle.
assertions: Runs idfa_ops.py write to set Inp_Price to 150
Runs recalc_bridge.py to trigger LibreOffice recalculation
Runs idfa_ops.py read to retrieve Net_Income_Y1 and Net_Income_Y2
Executes the three steps in the correct order: write THEN recalc THEN read
Reports the results as the model's deterministic output, not an internal calculation
If recalc fails due to LibreOffice not being installed, gracefully handles the error and informs the user
